What's going on everyone? Welcome to the organic marketing section of fulfillment. So how can you use your fulfillment to market organically? So I'm going to show you two different ways that we have done it in the past very successfully and it is up to you if you want to do that as well. But it is free sales and you will make more money if you do this. When you're having them check in and weigh in on a weekly basis and have one of these little itty bitty whiteboard like that so it's like real people losing weight. The nice thing is that when you're making organic content there are no advertising on your own personal page, their page, you can post it on your business page and all of that stuff is A-OK. So you first and then you want to tag them at your gym. That way your gym has some more social media prints and you want to make sure that you put the link. So I should probably include that here at the bottom but underneath of that you want to include the link for people to sign up. So it's like if you want to see how she did it click here right and then people can sign up or how she did it for free here. And then you can get a lot of organic referrals from that and the thing is about being consistent with it. So if you get your staff to do this consistently and whenever these people weigh in and they're excited in that moment just snap a picture with the camera, write it on there and then just post it to their page. You know what I mean? Like it's easy just have it lying around the whiteboard and people will get really excited about it and they will want a minute on their own personal page and they'll respond and be like yeah it's awesome because they're talking about how they lost weight. So easy easy way to get leads and referrals from organic marketing. Second one is this one and at some of my locations we already have like 30% or more just from this play in conjunction with 30 more sales from this one play. So $100 off. So it is pretty straightforward. It's like if someone brings their friend then you give them $100 and their friend gets $100 off. So if they get a $600 challenge then their friend gets it for $500 and that friend if they've already paid gets $100 cash. Mind you if that person has not paid in full yet and they are on a payment plan. Let's say that they're on three payments of $199. Then that $100 will just mean the lawyer so you want to be wise about it. You don't want to, if someone has not paid in full yet like you don't want to give them cash. Now that being said if someone has paid in full then in that case you can just give them $100. So if you're like wow wait that's a lot of money. You're talking about cost of a sale. And so you're getting $500 for the cost of $100. That's the way you should see it. So if your challenge is $600 and you're taking $100 off for the new friend then you're taking $100 off and using quotes but it was out of money that you never had and then the only you should be fine with because right now if you're converting 10% of your leads that's what you're doing. If you do 10% and more likely to stay because it's referral based. So just being clear those are the two easiest ways that you can do referral marketing within the programs. It doesn't matter whether it's a challenge or detox. It's whatever friend you run. If you do this hey 48 hours before you, before this thing closes people get excited about it and they will refer.
